attributes.action: Abolish the outdated TV licence and make the BBC fund themselves
attributes.additional_details: We the British people should not be funding such a company. Make them fund themselves
attributes.background: The TV licence is just a stealth tax on the UK people, make the BBC fund themselves through advertising as they already receive advertising revenue from their partnered channels.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Scrap the TV Licence
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754524
